name: blueprint-tdd-family
summary: Remove TDD as standalone Stage 7 option, enforce TDD per-WU via work graph annotation, change default challenge mode from debate to family, improve family mode scaffolding

key_risks: blueprint.md file conflict across WU-3, WU-6, WU-7 (different sections)
test.sh count checks may need updating
